attribution.name: NeoForged primers
attribution.includedContent: Compact searchable summaries, content hashes, source paths, headings, and previews.

attribution.name: misode technical changes
attribution.includedContent: Compact searchable summaries, content hashes, source paths, headings, and previews.

entries.title: Minecraft 1.19.1 version-change sources
entries.summary: Authoritative version-change evidence should combine NeoForged primers for loader migration notes with misode technical-changes markdown for vanilla data and resource format changes.

entries.title: misode 1.19.1-pre2 technical changes
entries.summary: options | The server property enforce-secure-profile now defaults to true.

metadata.preview:
options | The server property enforce-secure-profile now defaults to true.

text chat-type data | Removed the system, game_info, and tellraw_command chat types.

text chat-type | Removed the overlay field in chat types. Chat types can now no longer be used to show text on the actionbar.

text chat-type | Flattened the chat type decorations, which are now placed directly in the chat and narration fields, without a decoration object. Removed the priority field in narration.

entries.title: misode 1.19.1-pre3 technical changes
entries.summary: assets splash | Added splash text "Technoblade never dies!".

metadata.preview:
assets splash | Added splash text "Technoblade never dies!".

text chat-type | Renamed the team_name parameter to target. This is now also used in the msg_command_outgoing chat type.

text chat-type data | The msg_command chat type has been split into msg_command_outgoing and msg_command_incoming.

entries.title: misode 1.19.1-rc1 technical changes
entries.summary: text | The run_command click event no longer supports sending chat messages. Values now always need to have / as prefix.

metadata.preview: text | The run_command click event no longer supports sending chat messages. Values now always need to have / as prefix.

entries.title: misode 22w24a technical changes
entries.summary: api | Changed launchermeta.mojang.com -> piston-meta.mojang.com. The old URL is still supported for now.

metadata.preview:
api | Changed launchermeta.mojang.com -> piston-meta.mojang.com. The old URL is still supported for now.

game-event | Added game events jukebox_play and jukebox_stop_play.

assets | Added icons for chat reporting to the guide/social_interactions.png texture.

text chat-type | The style field in chat type decorations is now optional.
